recommendations.title: The Only Living Boy in New York
recommendations.overview: When a young man learns that his overbearing father is having an affair, he tries to stop it, only to be seduced by the older woman as well.

recommendations.title: Gifted
recommendations.overview: Frank, a single man raising his child prodigy niece Mary, is drawn into a custody battle with his mother.

recommendations.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
recommendations.overview: Peter Parker is an outcast high schooler abandoned by his parents as a boy, leaving him to be raised by his Uncle Ben and Aunt May. Like most teenagers, Peter is trying to figure out who he is and how he got to be the person he is today. As Peter dis

recommendations.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
recommendations.overview: For Peter Parker, life is busy. Between taking out the bad guys as Spider-Man and spending time with the person he loves, Gwen Stacy, high school graduation cannot come quickly enough. Peter has not forgotten about the promise he made to Gwen’s fathe

recommendations.title: Purple Noon
recommendations.overview: Tom Ripley is a talented mimic, moocher, forger and all-around criminal improviser; but there's more to Tom Ripley than even he can guess.

recommendations.title: Slumdog Millionaire
recommendations.overview: A teenager reflects on his life after being accused of cheating on the Indian version of "Who Wants to be a Millionaire?".

recommendations.title: Girlfriend's Day
recommendations.overview: When he's caught up in a deadly conspiracy, an unemployed greeting card writer must create the perfect card for a new holiday to save his skin.

recommendations.title: The Lonely Guy
recommendations.overview: A writer for a greeting card company learns the true meaning of loneliness when he comes home to find his girlfriend in bed with another man.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Tom Jones
recommendations.overview: Tom loves Sophie and Sophie loves Tom. But Tom and Sophie are of differering classes. Can they find a way through the mayhem to be true to love?
